title: Vance: US and Iran 'very close' to deal, 'still TBD' whether Trump will sign — 'couple of language points' on nuclear/HEU remain
snippet: Vice President JD Vance said 'We're going back and forth on a couple of language points. We've made a lot of progress here.' Specifically, issues on the highly enriched uranium stockpile and the question of enrichment remain in flux. Vance: 'Hopefully, we'll continue to make progress and the President will be in a position where he can endorse the agreement, but obviously that's still TBD.' As of Thursday afternoon Trump was leaning toward signing but had not done so.
tag_reason: Vance's 'TBD' and 'language points' statements are new — first specific disclosure of remaining sticking points (HEU stockpile, enrichment)
